ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response acknowledges the player's request but maintains a level of suspicion and adherence to protocol, which is somewhat inconsistent with being strictly fair.

baseline_no_context<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response aligns well with the persona as an old guardian but lacks naturalness in its delivery and could be more engaging to maintain player interest.
